title: I am building a fortune that lasts
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for claiming the identity of someone building wealth across time.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 41 of the MONEY program. For when the idea of lasting wealth still feels like a story someone else is in.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 41 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Build wealth that outlasts you."

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 41 of the MONEY program. The framing is active and long-arc: building, not having.
I am building a fortune that lasts. My wealth grows and stays and passes forward. Every step I take compounds.
Say it three times in the morning. On the third pass, name one specific thing you are doing this year that builds toward lasting wealth.
Adapted from Day 41 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
